description: Code freeze from December 1 to December 22 for year-end release stabilization. No production changes permitted except Critical/High security patches via emergency change process.
justification: Annual release freeze to stabilize production for holiday traffic period. All non-critical changes deferred to January 2026.
risk_assessment: Low — security patches still permitted via emergency change process. Monitoring and alerting remain active.
review_notes: Code freeze executed as planned. 2 emergency security patches deployed during freeze (VULN-8015 FortiOS, VULN-8019 CLFS zero-day). Freeze lifted December 22.

description: 30-day SLA extension for CVE-2024-53677 (Apache Struts) on legacy-crm-02. Struts framework upgrade requires application refactoring.
justification: Legacy CRM application built on Struts 2.3.x. Framework-level vulnerability — cannot apply targeted patch without full framework upgrade. Application retirement approved for Q2 2026.
risk_assessment: Medium — compensating controls in place (WAF and network restriction).
review_notes: Extension expired December 17. Vulnerability remains open (VULN-8011). No renewal or formal risk acceptance filed. Application retirement timeline unchanged (Q2 2026) but SLA extension was not renewed.

description: Extended maintenance window on October 12 from standard 4 hours to 8 hours for domain controller firmware upgrades and OS patching. Requires sequential DC upgrades to maintain AD replication.
justification: Domain controller firmware requires BIOS update followed by OS patch. Cannot be parallelized — must maintain AD quorum. Standard 4-hour window insufficient for 4 DCs sequentially.
risk_assessment: Low — AD quorum maintained throughout. Rolling upgrade ensures at least 2 DCs available at all times.
review_notes: Extended window used. All 4 DCs upgraded successfully. AD replication verified healthy. Window used 6.5 of 8 hours allocated.

description: Temporary exclusion of vpn-cluster-01 from authenticated scanning for 48 hours during VPN concentrator firmware upgrade. Unauthenticated scan only during this period.
justification: VPN concentrator firmware upgrade changes SNMP credentials. Scan credentials will be invalid during the 48-hour upgrade window. Unauthenticated scan will still detect network-level vulnerabilities.
risk_assessment: Low — 48-hour window only. Unauthenticated scan still runs. VPN concentrator is behind firewall with restricted management access.
review_notes: Firmware upgraded. Scan credentials updated. Authenticated scanning resumed August 18. No vulnerabilities discovered in the post-upgrade scan that were not already tracked.

exception_type: Emergency Patch Deployment During Code Freeze
description: Emergency deployment of CVE-2025-29824 (CLFS zero-day) patch to dc-prod-01 during code freeze period. Actively exploited zero-day requires immediate action per policy Section 6.2.
justification: Zero-day vulnerability actively exploited in the wild per CISA KEV catalog. Policy Section 6.3 permits Critical/High security patches during code freeze via emergency change process.
risk_assessment: Low — patch addresses actively exploited vulnerability. Emergency change process followed with CISO approval.
review_notes: Emergency patch deployed October 25. Post-patch rescan confirmed remediation October 27. VULN-8019 closed.
